name: The Baptism Of Jesus
notes: Jesus comes from Galilee to be baptized, the heavens open, the Spirit descends like a dove, and a voice from heaven names him the beloved Son. Matthew alone records the exchange with John (3:14-15), which is left unlinked. Mark and Luke each compress the heaven-opened, dove, and voice beats into two verses, so several edges fan out to a single verse on the Mark or Luke side.

links.label: the Spirit like a dove descending
